ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fruits" (
  "fruit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fruit sample */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the fruit (e.g., apple, peach, orange) */,
  "redness" REAL /* Redness value of the fruit */,
  "yellowness" REAL /* Yellowness value of the fruit */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the fruit in grams */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the fruit in cubic centimeters */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the fruit sample was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the fruit sample was collected */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the fruit sample belongs to */,
  "harvested_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who harvested the fruit */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the fruit was harvested */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the fruit was stored */,
  "maturity_level" TEXT /* Level of maturity of the fruit */,
  "defects" TEXT /* Description of any defects observed in the fruit */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the fruit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fruit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fruits_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fruits_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fruits_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES fruit_classes ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fruits_harvested_by FOREIGN KEY ("harvested_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Farm A, Plant B) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., farm, processing plant, research lab) */,
  "acreage" REAL /* Size of the farm or area of the plant */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the source */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation used at the source */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the batch */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the batch */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the batch was collected */,
  "total_fruits" INTEGER /* Total number of fruits in the batch */,
  "average_mass" REAL /* Average mass of fruits in the batch */,
  "average_volume" REAL /* Average volume of fruits in the batch */,
  "total_defects" INTEGER /* Total number of fruits with defects in the batch */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fruit_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fruit class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the fruit class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fruit class */,
  "optimal_storage_conditions" TEXT /* Optimal storage conditions for the fruit class */,
  "optimal_harvest_time" TEXT /* Optimal time to harvest the fruit class */,
  "common_defects" TEXT /* Common defects observed in the fruit class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "fruit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fruit sample the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the quality metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of quality metric (e.g., chemical, physical) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the metric */,
  "reference_value" REAL /* Reference value for the metric */,
  "deviation_from_reference" REAL /* Deviation from the reference value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_fruit_id FOREIGN KEY ("fruit_id") REFERENCES fruits ("fruit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., quality control, production, R&D) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "fruit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fruit sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., updated, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fruit_id FOREIGN KEY ("fruit_id") REFERENCES fruits ("fruit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data point */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., weather, soil composition) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the external data */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the external data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the external data was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the external data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the external data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the external data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fruit_external_data" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "fruit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fruit sample */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fruit_external_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES external_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fruit_external_data_fruit_id FOREIGN KEY ("fruit_id") REFERENCES fruits ("fruit_id")
)
